O cientista procura por respostas, os Chapéus de Palha querem tesouros, e fantasmas que assombram as brumas querem as almas de todos! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: Habitantes da Terra da Eternidade! Os Piratas Abóbora!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E05

programme.title: 2002. Luffy e o bando procuram uma forma de fugir de Concerto dos Símios, mas a Bruma do Arco-Íris é um labirinto sem fuga. Na costa, Nami, Chopper, e Sanji encaram uma vida de trabalhos forçados por não pagarem impostos! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: Lembranças do Lar! O Cemitério Pirata Sem Fuga!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E06

programme.title: 2002. Nami adentra a bruma em missão para salvar seus companheiros e, talvez, caçar uns tesouros. O Prefeito a quer morta, mas o bando é protegido por um marinheiro misterioso. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: Um Confronto Inevitável! As Tramas de Wetton e a Torre do Arco-íris!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E07

programme.title: 2002. O confronto com o Prefeito Wetton chega a uma conclusão explosiva, quando os Chapéus de Palha partem para fugir da Bruma do Arco-Íris ou ficarem nela presos para sempre. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: E a Lenda tem Início! O Outro Lado do Arco-Íris!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E08

programme.title: 2002. Os Chapéus de Palha quase acabam mortos pela queda dos destroços de um navio de 200 anos de idade. Os boatos de uma ilha nos céus seriam verdadeiros? Luffy, Zoro e Sanji mergulham para descobrir! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: O Log é Roubado! O Rei das Recuperações, Masira!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E09

programme.title: 2002. Ainda em busca de uma rota para a ilha do céu, os Chapéus de Palha traçam o caminho para Jaya. Enquanto isso, Ace Punho de Fogo pega carona em um navio comandado por Buggy, o Palhaço! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: Verdadeiros Monstros! Não Mexa com os Piratas do Barba Branca!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E10

programme.title: 2002. Os Chapéus de Palha ancoram em uma cidade tomada por marginais, e Nami faz os rapazes jurarem não se meter em encrenca. Mas quando Bellamy e seus piratas procuram briga, Luffy quebra a promessa! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: Pare de Sonhar! Mock Town, a Cidade do Escárnio!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E11

programme.title: 2002. Nico Robin encontra um homem que pode conhecer o caminho para a Ilha do Céu. Luffy e seu bando só precisam sobreviver ao massacre dos símios que querem afundar o Going Merry! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: Piratas Diferenciados! Um Homem que Fala de Sonhos e a Busca Pelo Rei Submarino!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E12

programme.title: 2002. Luffy e seu bando chegam ao lar de Montblanc Cricket: o homem com a chave para chegar à Ilha do Céu. Há apenas um pequeno problema - ele é herdeiro de uma distinta linhagem de lendários mentirosos. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: A Família Lendária! Noland, o Mentiroso!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E13

programme.title: 2002. Montblanc Cricket aceita ajudar os Chapéus de Palha a chegar à Ilha do Céu, mas primeiro eles devem se aventurar nas profundezas mais sombrias de uma floresta infestada de aranhas para capturar um pássaro com um tenaz senso de direção. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: Acelerem Para as Nuvens! Capturem o Pássaro do Sul!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E14

programme.title: 2002. Enquanto os Chapéus de Palha enfrentam criaturas da floresta em busca do Pássaro do Sul, Montblanc e seus símios são brutalmente atacados pelos Piratas de Bellamy! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: Sonhos Não Se Realizam? Bellamy vs. A Aliança Saruyama!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E15

programme.title: 2002. Luffy deu a outra face em seu primeiro encontro com Bellamy, mas agora quer acertar as contas pelo velho Montblanc! Enquanto isso, um novo bando de piratas está de olho nos Chapéus de Palha! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: O Homem de 100 Milhões! O Maior Poder do Mundo e o Pirata Barba Negra!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E16

programme.title: 2002. Graças a modificações no Merry, os Chapéus de Palha seguem para a ilha do céu! Mas com o bando do Barba Negra em seu encalço, navegar a Corrente de Gancho não será trabalho fácil! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: Rumo aos Céus! Peguem a Corrente de Gancho!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E17

programme.title: 2002. Alcançar o mar de nuvens foi tarefa fácil perto do trabalho de sobreviver a ele, quando criaturas do mar do céu atacam o Merry, Usopp quase se afoga e um estranho Cavaleiro do Céu dá um aviso aos Chapéus de Palha! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: Naveguem o Mar Branco! O Cavaleiro do Céu e o Portão nas Nuvens!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E18

programme.desc: Death Note - T01E04

programme.title: 2007. Soichiro Yagami exige uma reunião em pessoa com L quando ele descobre que ele secretamente levou agentes do FBI para o Japão. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E05

programme.title: 2007. Light se reune com uma mulher no departamento de polícia, pois tem uma mensagem importante para o Kira. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E06

programme.title: 2007. Light usa o Death Note para tentar se livrar de uma mulher que poderia ter levado para a prisão. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E07

programme.title: 2007. L coloca microfones e câmeras nas casas dos membros do grupo especial, incluindo a casa de Yagami, mas Light dá um passo a frente. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E08

programme.title: 2007. Os assassinatos continuam, e L começa a suspeitar do comportamento perfeito de Light que então decide investigar por conta própria. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E09

programme.title: 2007. As suspeitas de L estão cada vez maior, e Light o convence a convidá-lo para a investigação. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E10

programme.title: 2007. Como previsto nas fitas enviadas a TV Sakura, apresentadores e comentaristas de notícias expressaram suas dúvidas sobre a morte de Kira. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E11

programme.title: 2008. Com um segundo Kira solto, L pede Light para se unir ao grupo especial para descobrir o paradeiro do verdadeiro Kira. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E12

programme.title: 2008. Light viaja a Aoyama para descobrir a identidade do segundo Kira antes que L suspeite mais ainda. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E13

programme.title: 2008. Light e Misa mostram seus Death Notes, então Light pede que Misa use sua Rem Shinigami para se livrar de L. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E14

programme.desc: Death Note - T01E15

programme.desc: Death Note - T01E16

programme.desc: Death Note - T01E17

programme.desc: Death Note - T01E18

programme.desc: Death Note - T01E19

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King
programme.desc: Frodo (Elijah Wood) and Sam march toward Mount Doom to destroy the ring, while Gandalf (Ian McKellen) and warriors prepare for a final confrontation with Sauron and his allies. Starring Elijah Wood, Ian McKellen, Liv Tyler.

programme.title: Outlander: Blood of my Blood
programme.desc: Henry tackles a challenging assignment in his own way; Ellen learns some concerning information about the family into which shes expected to marry.

programme.title: The Strangers: Chapter 1
programme.desc: After their car breaks down in an eerie small town, a young couple is forced to spend the night in a remote cabin. Panic ensues as they are terrorized by three masked strangers who strike with no mercy and seemingly no motive. Starring Madelaine Petsch, Froy Gutierrez, Gabriel Basso.

programme.title: The Strangers: Chapter 2
programme.desc: After learning that their victim, Maya, is still alive, three masked maniacs return to finish the job. With nowhere to run and no one to trust, Maya finds herself in a fight for survival against psychopaths wholl kill anyone who stands in their way. Starring Madelaine Petsch, Gabriel Basso, Froy Gutierrez.

programme.title: At First Light
programme.desc: A close encounter with mysterious lights sends two teens on the run after one discovers she has extraordinary but dangerous powers. Starring Stefanie Scott, Theodore Pellerin, Said Taghmaoui.

programme.title: Heavenly Bodies
programme.desc: Samantha quits her job to open an aerobics studio and competes with a larger clubs lead instructor to become an aerobics instructor on a local fitness television show. Starring Cynthia Dale, Richard Rebiere, Walter George Alton.

programme.title: Stage Fright
programme.desc: Blood begins to spill soon after the daughter (Allie MacDonald) of a Broadway diva wins the lead in the summer showcase at a performing-arts camp. Starring Allie MacDonald, Douglas Smith, Minnie Driver.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: When abnormals begin assaulting humans, the Sanctuary team suspects an airborne virus or biological agent to be the cause.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: The Five, led by Magnus, attempt to find the secret labyrinth in the decimated city of Bhalasaam; once located, they must complete a series of cryptic tests that can only be achieved using each of their unique powers.

programme.title: Manufactured Landscapes
programme.desc: The work of photographer Edward Burtynsky includes Chinas ongoing Industrial Revolution.

programme.title: The Secret Garden
programme.desc: An English orphan (Kate Maberly) discovers her bitter uncles garden with her sickly cousin (Heydon Prowse), and it is magical. Starring Kate Maberly, Heydon Prowse, Maggie Smith.

programme.title: Santa Claus: The Movie
programme.desc: Santa (David Huddleston) and an elf (Dudley Moore) foil a New York toy manufacturers (John Lithgow) scheme to get rich off Christmas. Starring Dudley Moore, David Huddleston, John Lithgow.

programme.title: Nelly and Simon: Mission Yeti
programme.desc: A private eye and a university research assistant search for the abominable snowman in the Himalayas. Starring Sylvie Moreau, Guillaume Lemay-Thivierge, Rachid Badouri.

programme.title: Dr. Seuss Horton Hears a Who!
programme.desc: Horton the elephants friends and neighbors think he has gone crazy when he claims that a tiny community lives on a speck of dust. Starring Jim Carrey, Steve Carell, Amy Poehler.

programme.title: The Grand Seduction
programme.desc: Residents of a small fishing community in Newfoundland charm a doctor into becoming the towns full-time physician in order to secure a vital factory contract. Starring Brendan Gleeson, Taylor Kitsch, Liane Balaban.

programme.title: Men in Black II
programme.desc: Two interstellar agents try to stop an alien disguised as a lingerie model from destroying the world. Starring Tommy Lee Jones, Will Smith, Rip Torn.

programme.title: Country Strong
programme.desc: Personal demons, complicated romantic entanglements and the demands of fame threaten to derail the comeback tour of a country-music superstar (Gwyneth Paltrow). Starring Gwyneth Paltrow, Tim McGraw, Garrett Hedlund.

programme.title: The Pursuit of Happyness
programme.desc: A struggling salesman takes custody of his son as hes poised to begin a life-changing professional career. Starring Will Smith, Jaden Smith, Thandiwe Newton.

programme.title: The Act
programme.desc: Gypsy is excited to start over with Nick in Wisconsin, but their new life doesnt match the happily-ever-after she imagined, and her anxiety worsens as past transgressions begin to catch up with them.

programme.title: The Act
programme.desc: Gypsy fights for her life by defending her actions, while Mel and Lacey realize that behind closed doors things were not always as they seemed.

programme.title: Easy Land
programme.desc: A mentally ill Serbian architect tries to build a better future for her daughter in Canada. Starring Mirjana Jokovic, Nina Kiri, Daniel Kash.

programme.title: Lie With Me
programme.desc: A young man (Eric Balfour) and woman (Lauren Lee Smith) enjoy sexual compatibility but have trouble communicating and helping each other with problems. Starring Eric Balfour, Lauren Lee Smith, Don Francks.

programme.title: The Journals of Knud Rasmussen
programme.desc: European explorers change the lives of an Inuit community while exploring the Arctic in 1922. Starring Leah Angutimarik, Natar Ungalaaq, Peter-Henry Arnatsiaq.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: The search for Ashley puts Magnus, Will, Druitt and Tesla in the path of Kate Freelander, a con artist with ties to the Cabal who divulges the location of a secret facility.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus demands information from Kate; Tesla and Henry try to create a weapon that can stop attacks on Sanctuaries without killing Ashley.

programme.title: Cairo Time
programme.desc: During a vacation in Egypt, an unexpected love affair arises between a magazine editor (Patricia Clarkson) and her husbands former colleague (Alexander Siddig). Starring Patricia Clarkson, Alexander Siddig, Elena Anaya.

programme.title: Ozzy
programme.desc: A lovable dog must rely on some new friends to help it break out of canine prison and get back home to his owners. Starring Jeff Foxworthy, Rob Schneider, Frankie Quiñones.

programme.title: Babe
programme.desc: An Australian farmer (James Cromwell) adopts a piglet that becomes a champion sheep herder. Live action/animatronics. Starring James Cromwell, Magda Szubanski, Hugo Weaving.

programme.title: Double, Double, Toil and Trouble
programme.desc: Determined twins (Mary-Kate Olsen, Ashley Olsen) try to trick an evil aunt (Cloris Leachman) out of a magic moonstone and save their family home. Starring Mary-Kate Olsen, Ashley Olsen, Cloris Leachman.

programme.title: Dennis the Menace
programme.desc: The comic-strip moppet (Mason Gamble) plays pranks on Mr. Wilson (Walter Matthau), the crotchety fellow who lives next door. Starring Walter Matthau, Mason Gamble, Joan Plowright.

programme.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: A poor boy (Freddie Highmore) and four spoiled children win a tour through the incredible factory of an odd confectioner (Johnny Depp). Starring Johnny Depp, Freddie Highmore, David Kelly.

programme.title: Nancy Drew
programme.desc: Accompanying her father on a business trip to Hollywood, the young sleuth (Emma Roberts) investigates the long-unsolved death of a movie star. Starring Emma Roberts, Josh Flitter, Max Thieriot.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: An actual witch (Nicole Kidman) and a neurotic movie star (Will Ferrell) land the lead roles in a television remake of the 1960s sitcom. Starring Nicole Kidman, Will Ferrell, Shirley MacLaine.

programme.title: Rent
programme.desc: Artists, junkies and misfits in New Yorks East Village struggle with poverty, illness and the AIDS epidemic. Starring Rosario Dawson, Taye Diggs, Jesse L. Martin.

programme.title: The Couple Next Door
programme.desc: Evie and Pete move to suburbia with the dream of starting a family; but its not long before Evies dreams start to take a different shape -- that of her hot new neighbor, Danny.

programme.title: The Couple Next Door
programme.desc: The electric chemistry between Danny and Evie increases, amusing Becka and horrifying Pete; Dannys moonlighting takes a dangerous turn and Alans obsession with Becka grows.

programme.title: Gabrielle
programme.desc: A young woman who has Williams syndrome possesses amazing musical talents but struggles continually to gain her independence. Starring Gabrielle Marion-Rivard, Vincent-Guillaume Otis, Sebastien Ricard.

programme.title: Eve and the Fire Horse
programme.desc: A 9-year-old Chinese girl (Phoebe Jojo Kut) and her older sister (Hollie Lo) embrace their experiences at a Roman Catholic Sunday school. Starring Phoebe Jojo Kut, Hollie Lo, Vivian Wu.

programme.title: Air Bud: Spikes Back
programme.desc: A dog that plays volleyball helps investigators solve a rash of mysterious crimes. Starring Rob Tinkler, Cynthia Stevenson, Katija Pevec.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Dr. Magnus and Druitt struggle to come to terms with the apparent death of their daughter; Will, Henry and Bigfoot must organize and process hundreds of surviving Abnormals.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: When a superhero begins to thwart crime in the city, the Sanctuary team must capture him to discover if he is an Abnormal.

programme.title: Miltons Secret
programme.desc: A man (Donald Sutherland) teaches his 11-year-old grandson (William Ainscough) how to cope with bickering parents and the neighborhood bully. Starring Donald Sutherland, Michelle Rodriguez, Mia Kirshner.

programme.title: Pride and Prejudice
programme.desc: A convoluted courtship begins between a young woman and the handsome, but less wealthy, friend of a rich bachelor. Starring Keira Knightley, Matthew Macfadyen, Brenda Blethyn.

programme.title: Cooking With Stella
programme.desc: A woman cooks for clients and tries to keep her thefts of food and money from being discovered. Starring Don McKellar, Seema Biswas, Lisa Ray.

programme.title: Fantastic Mr. Fox
programme.desc: After three nefarious farmers declare war on them, a sly fox (George Clooney) rallies his animal neighbors to fight back. Starring George Clooney, Meryl Streep, Jason Schwartzman.

programme.title: Independence Day
programme.desc: When alien invaders lay waste to planet Earth, its up to a select group of survivors to make a last-ditch stand. Fighting superior technology, mankinds best weapon is the will to survive. Starring Will Smith, Bill Pullman, Jeff Goldblum.

programme.title: The LEGO Batman Movie
programme.desc: There are big changes brewing in Gotham, but if Batman (Will Arnett) wants to save the city from the Jokers hostile takeover, he may have to drop the lone vigilante thing, try to work with others and maybe, just maybe, learn to lighten up. Starring Will Arnett, Michael Cera, Rosario Dawson.

programme.title: Shazam!
programme.desc: Billy Batson is a streetwise 14-year-old who can magically transform into the adult superhero Shazam simply by shouting out one word. His newfound powers soon get put to the test when he squares off against the evil Dr. Thaddeus Sivana. Starring Zachary Levi, Mark Strong, Asher Angel.

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: In 2009, Somali pirates storm a U.S. container ship and hold Capt. Richard Phillips and his crew captive. Starring Tom Hanks, Catherine Keener, Barkhad Abdi.

programme.title: The Couple Next Door
programme.desc: The sexual tension between the two couples reaches a boiling point during a weekend away; Alans obsession with Becka escalates further, with devastating consequences.

programme.title: The Couple Next Door
programme.desc: Pete struggles to process what happened during the spa weekend; Evie conceals a secret; Becka deals with the fallout from the blog post and Spencer gives Danny an ultimatum.

programme.title: Run This Town
programme.desc: A journalist and a political aide become entangled in a larger-than-life scandal. Starring Ben Platt, Mena Massoud, Nina Dobrev.

programme.title: Edge of Winter
programme.desc: Stranded at a remote cabin in the wintertime, two siblings (Tom Holland, Percy Hynes White) must fight for survival as their increasingly unhinged father (Joel Kinnaman) loses his grip on reality. Starring Joel Kinnaman, Tom Holland, Percy Hynes White.

programme.title: Waterloo Bridge
programme.desc: A ballet dancer (Vivien Leigh) and a British officer (Robert Taylor) cross stars on the eve of World War I. Starring Vivien Leigh, Robert Taylor, Lucile Watson.

programme.title: Love Before Breakfast
programme.desc: An oil tycoon (Preston Foster) in love with a socialite (Carole Lombard) sends his romantic rival (Cesar Romero) to Japan on business. Starring Carole Lombard, Preston Foster, Cesar Romero.

programme.title: Hands Across the Table
programme.desc: A manicurist (Carole Lombard) and a playboy (Fred MacMurray) try to marry for money; they fall in love with each other instead. Starring Carole Lombard, Fred MacMurray, Ralph Bellamy.

programme.title: Virtue
programme.desc: Accusations of murder complicate the life of an ex-prostitute whose marriage to a kind cabbie has helped change her life. Starring Carole Lombard, Pat OBrien, Mayo Methot.

programme.title: Siren of the Tropics
programme.desc: A West Indies woman (Josephine Baker) falls for a Frenchman (Pierre Batcheff) and becomes a star performer in Paris. Starring Josephine Baker, Pierre Batcheff, Regina Dalthy.

programme.title: The Firemens Ball
programme.desc: Plans to honor their 86-year-old chief at a special ball go awry for a group of well-meaning Czechoslovakian firemen. Starring Jan Vostrcil, Josef Sebanek, Josef Valnoha.

programme.title: Loves of a Blonde
programme.desc: A Czech musician (Vladimir Pucholt) seduces and abandons a factory worker (Hana Brejchová). Starring Hana Brejchová, Vladimir Pucholt, Vladimír Mensík.

programme.title: The Catered Affair
programme.desc: An Irish cabby (Ernest Borgnine) in the Bronx watches his wife (Bette Davis) go overboard planning their daughters (Debbie Reynolds) wedding. Starring Bette Davis, Ernest Borgnine, Debbie Reynolds.

programme.title: I Love Melvin
programme.desc: A magazine photographers helper (Donald OConnor) rashly promises to put a chorus girl (Debbie Reynolds) on the cover. Starring Donald OConnor, Debbie Reynolds, Una Merkel.

programme.title: Kismet
programme.desc: Fate follows a beggar king (Ronald Colman), his daughter, a dancer (Marlene Dietrich), and the caliph and grand vizier (Edward Arnold) of Baghdad. Starring Ronald Colman, Marlene Dietrich, Edward Arnold.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Based on the story by Louisa May Alcott. The four March sisters forge unbreakable emotional ties during the Civil War. Starring June Allyson, Peter Lawford, Elizabeth Taylor.

programme.title: Singin in the Rain
programme.desc: A silent-film star (Gene Kelly) loves a chorus girl (Debbie Reynolds) who dubs his squeaky-voiced co-star in a 1927 Hollywood talkie. Starring Gene Kelly, Debbie Reynolds, Donald OConnor.

programme.title: The Bad and the Beautiful
programme.desc: A ruthless producer (Kirk Douglas) uses and discards Hollywood hopefuls as stepping stones to the top of the Tinseltown heap. Starring Lana Turner, Kirk Douglas, Walter Pidgeon.

programme.title: When Ladies Meet
programme.desc: The wife (Ann Harding) of a publisher meets his girlfriend (Myrna Loy), who does not know hes married. Starring Ann Harding, Robert Montgomery, Myrna Loy.

programme.title: Act of Violence
programme.desc: A crippled World War II veteran (Robert Ryan) stalks a contractor (Van Heflin) whose prison-camp betrayal caused a massacre. Starring Van Heflin, Robert Ryan, Janet Leigh.

programme.title: Tommy
programme.desc: The Whos rock opera follows a mute, deaf and blind, boy (Roger Daltrey) who becomes a pinball wizard. Starring Roger Daltrey, Ann-Margret, Oliver Reed.

programme.title: It Happened in Brooklyn
programme.desc: A returned GI (Frank Sinatra), a British nobleman (Peter Lawford), a school janitor and a teacher (Kathryn Grayson) make music together. Starring Frank Sinatra, Kathryn Grayson, Peter Lawford.

programme.title: Pennies From Heaven
programme.desc: A sheet-music salesman (Steve Martin) escapes his wife, girlfriend (Bernadette Peters) and the Depression through his songs. Starring Steve Martin, Bernadette Peters, Christopher Walken.

programme.title: Hair
programme.desc: An Oklahoman (John Savage) bound for Vietnam falls in love with a New York debutante (Beverly DAngelo) and discovers the Age of Aquarius with hippies in Central Park. Starring John Savage, Treat Williams, Beverly DAngelo.

programme.title: Divine Madness
programme.desc: Bette Midler dresses up, tells racy jokes and sings "The Rose," "I Shall Be Released," "Leader of the Pack." Starring Bette Midler, The Harlettes.

programme.title: Ill See You in My Dreams
programme.desc: Songwriter Gus Kahn (Danny Thomas) and his wife (Doris Day) have problems as he pens hit tunes like "It Had to Be You." Starring Doris Day, Danny Thomas, Frank Lovejoy.

programme.title: Deep in My Heart
programme.desc: Hungarian Sigmund Romberg (Jose Ferrer) comes to circa-1900 New York and becomes a composer for Broadway and Hollywood. Starring Jose Ferrer, Merle Oberon, Helen Traubel.

programme.title: The Helen Morgan Story
programme.desc: A hoodlum (Paul Newman), a lawyer (Richard Carlson) and alcoholism affect the 1920s torch singers (Ann Blyth) career. Starring Ann Blyth, Paul Newman, Richard Carlson.

programme.title: Ziegfeld Follies
programme.desc: Showman Flo Ziegfeld (William Powell) looks down from heaven on a dream revue including Gene Kelly and Lucille Ball. Starring William Powell, Judy Garland, Fred Astaire.

programme.title: The Great Ziegfeld
programme.desc: The life and times of Broadway showman Florenz Ziegfeld (William Powell) and his two wives (Luise Rainer, Myrna Loy). Starring William Powell, Luise Rainer, Myrna Loy.

programme.title: Funny Girl
programme.desc: Ziegfeld Follies star Fanny Brice (Barbra Streisand) falls for gambler Nicky Arnstein (Omar Sharif). Starring Barbra Streisand, Omar Sharif, Walter Pidgeon.

programme.desc: A thief (George Tobias) kills for a huge diamond and frames a mine foreman (George Brent) in Africa. Starring George Brent, Brenda Marshall, George Tobias.

programme.desc: An undercover newsman (George Brent) gets close to a woman (Bette Davis) who does accounting for a racketeer (Ricardo Cortez). Starring Bette Davis, George Brent, Ricardo Cortez.

programme.desc: A divorcee (Kay Francis) arranges so her ex-husband can catch his second wife (Genevieve Tobin) being unfaithful. Starring Kay Francis, George Brent, Genevieve Tobin.

programme.title: Making a Statement - Making a Statement and Creating a Moment
programme.desc: Justin and Kevin, a builder in Atlanta, bring their heads together on renovating a standout property in Brookhaven for dramatic effect. Dedrick and actress Terri J Vaughn put together custom looks for the red carpet and award show stage.

programme.title: Style Kings - Bringing People Together through Style and Design
programme.desc: Dedrick hosts his famous Customer Appreciation crawfish boil with the likes of mayor Andre Dickens; Justin connects with repeat clients Sion and Desney as they put the finishing touches on a basement space.

programme.title: To Love and to Cherish

programme.title: Steps of Faith
programme.desc: Mocked by her family for opening a hippotherapy farm for children, Faith questions her message from God after a child is nearly injured and the work is overwhelming.

programme.title: Family Time - Powering Down
programme.desc: Tony feels his family is drifting apart so he bans technology in the household.

programme.title: Family Time - The Oops Baby
programme.desc: Tony and Lisa must deal with the possibility of a new baby.

programme.title: Family Time - Cut It Out
programme.desc: Tony spends time in the local barbershop with friends; Lori considers her options for having a baby.

programme.title: Family Time - Hobby Hunters
programme.desc: Tony and Lisa realize they have nothing to talk about so they attempt to find a hobby they can enjoy together.

programme.title: Family Time - Slide Hustles
programme.desc: Tony and Lisa find out that they dont have as much as theyd like; Lisa discovers she can make some extra money on social media; Donnie is driving for Goober and one of his clients is a little shady.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Stiff Upper Lip
programme.desc: Bernie decides Bryana is too old for training wheels, but her first lesson without them proves to be disastrous.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Being Bernie Mac
programme.desc: Bernie must baby-sit for Bryana and deal with Jordan, who was sent home from school for pulling a fire alarm unnecessarily.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Mac Overdrive
programme.desc: Bernie has no patience when trying to teach Vanessa to drive.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - My Privacy
programme.desc: Bernie realizes Bryana and Jordan are too old to share a room, so he moves her in with Vanessa, who is less than thrilled.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Who Gives This Bride
programme.desc: Bernies sister, Benita, announces her plans to elope in Las Vegas; Wanda offers her the Mac residence as a wedding site.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Stuck on You
programme.desc: When Regina takes over Steves planning for a dinner party, Steve reminds her that he is the boss at home.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Hate Thy Neighbor

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - The Shower Planner
programme.desc: Steve gets stuck planning all the girlie details for Lovitas baby shower.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - My Fair Homegirl
programme.desc: Regina hires and beautifies a new assistant (Cee Cee Michaela), then fears Steve may be trying to woo her.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Eye of the Tiger
programme.desc: Jordan tries out for the basketball team, but the coach decides he is better suited for gymnastics as a ribbon dancer.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Love Thy Nephew
programme.desc: When a litigious neighbor asks Bernie to tear down the treehouse he built for Jordan, it leads to an all-night standoff.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Road to Tradition
programme.desc: When the children become obsessed with gifts, Bernie decides to cancel Christmas altogether; Wanda loses the Christmas spirit when she tries to get everyone on her staff a gift.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Laughing Matters
programme.desc: Bernie turns to Angela Bassett for acting advice when he lands a dramatic role as a stroke victim; Jordan leads a revolt at a day care facility; Vanessa pretends to be poor.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Das Bootie
programme.desc: Steve and Regina (Steve Harvey, Wendy Raquel Robinson) take a romantic cruise, but everything seems to go wrong; Lydia (guest star Lori Beth Denberg) housesits.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - And Injustice for All
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) faces a judge (guest star Arnetia Walker) when Lovita (Terri J. Vaughn) takes him to court after he sells her a broken TV set.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Educating Piggy
programme.desc: Steve and Cedric (Steve Harvey, Cedric The Entertainer) have to take a computer course taught by Lovita (Terri J. Vaughn).

programme.title: The Dempsey Sisters

programme.desc: Yo-Yo lays out small bites that are packed with flavor; the menu is stuffed portobello mushrooms, BLT skewers with scallops and pesto, and the cocktail of the day is a blood orange Margarita.

programme.title: Downright Delicious With Yo-Yo - Simple and Delicious
programme.desc: Yo-Yo kicks things off with a penne pasta with spicy Italian sausage and a garlic tomato sauce; she shows off her skills with her version of fried rice, complete with eggs shrimp and more.

programme.title: Downright Delicious With Yo-Yo - Sunday Dinner
programme.desc: Yo-Yo lays out a Sunday dinner; its a homestyle recipe for slow-simmered short ribs and gravy served along with collard green and cabbage mix thats tender and well seasoned.

programme.title: Downright Delicious With Yo-Yo - Ladies First
programme.desc: For ladies night, YoYo makes buttery and delicious lobster rolls and doesnt skimp on the meat; she then takes it up a notch with a pan-seared salmon, drizzled with a creamy pesto sauce, served with a side of sauteed broccolini.

programme.title: Back to the Goode Life

programme.title: Family Time - Forbidden Fruits
programme.desc: Tony gets a new client, who happens to be a very attractive woman; Lisa and Tony are struggling to complete a ten-day all juice diet.

programme.title: Family Time - The Help
programme.desc: Tony decides to hire an assistant, but Lisa is not happy with the attractive female candidates; Lisa insists Tony hire a male assistant.

programme.title: Family Time - Salt N Pepa N Spice

programme.title: Family Time - Whats Ours Is Mine

programme.title: Family Time - Troop Dad

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Nerdy Mac

programme.sub-title: Friday the 13th, Part VI: Jason Lives (1986)
programme.desc: Teenage Tommy (Thom Mathews) meets masked-killer Jason, brought back by a lightning bolt at the lake.

programme.title: Star Trek V: The Final Frontier (1989)
programme.sub-title: Star Trek V: The Final Frontier (1989)
programme.desc: A renegade Vulcan makes Kirk (William Shatner), Spock (Leonard Nimoy), McCoy (DeForest Kelley) and the Enterprise go to a planet at the center of the galaxy.

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick (2022)
programme.desc: Pete "Maverick" Mitchell keeps pushing the envelope after years of service as one of the Navys top aviators. He must soon confront the past while training a new squad of graduates for a dangerous mission that demands the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: Barrons Cove (2024)
programme.desc: A man with a violent past kidnaps the boy he holds responsible for his sons death. As he grows closer to uncovering the truth, hes left to wonder whether his pursuers are really seeking to protect the boy, or merely the secrets he keeps.

programme.title: Switchback (1997)
programme.desc: A college student (Jared Leto) and a former rail worker (Danny Glover) are suspects in an FBI agents (Dennis Quaid) hunt for a serial killer who abducted his son.

programme.title: Downhill Racer (1969)
programme.desc: A cocky American skis and après-skis Europe, training with his coach for the Olympics.

programme.title: Top Gun (1986)
programme.desc: For Lieutenant Pete "Maverick" Mitchell and his friend and co-pilot Nick "Goose" Bradshaw, being accepted into an elite training school for fighter pilots is a dream come true. But a tragedy will threaten Petes dreams of becoming an ace pilot.

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick (2022)
programme.desc: Pete "Maverick" Mitchell keeps pushing the envelope after years of service as one of the Navys top aviators. He must soon confront the past while training a new squad of graduates for a dangerous mission that demands the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: 3 Days to Kill (2014)
programme.desc: A dying Secret Service agent (Kevin Costner) who wants to reconnect with his estranged daughter (Hailee Steinfeld) is offered a potentially lifesaving drug in exchange for completing one final mission.

programme.title: American Gigolo (1980)
programme.desc: A professional Beverly Hills escort falls in love with a big shots wife and winds up framed for murder.

programme.title: Persona (2024)
programme.desc: Two injured women find themselves trapped inside a secluded home with no memory of how they got there. Scared, confused, and distrustful of each other, they must figure out a way to escape before their captor comes back for them.

programme.title: The Ledge (2022)
programme.desc: A rock-climbing adventure turns into a living nightmare when a woman captures the murder of her best friend on camera. With nowhere to go, she begins a treacherous ascent up a mountain cliff as the killer and his friends follow close behind.

programme.title: Congo (1995)
programme.desc: Killer gorillas menace an ex-CIA agent (Laura Linney), a primatologist (Dylan Walsh) and others on a mission in Africa.

programme.title: Star Trek: First Contact (1996)
programme.desc: Picard (Patrick Stewart), Riker (Jonathan Frakes) and the others set off to stop the half-robot Borg from sabotaging the first warp drive flight in 2063.

programme.title: Star Trek: Nemesis (2002)
programme.desc: The crew (Jonathan Frakes, Brent Spiner) of the Enterprise must prevent a replica of Capt. Picard (Patrick Stewart) from overtaking Earth.

programme.title: The Cut (2024)
programme.desc: Given one last shot at glory, a former boxing champion has just six days to make weight for a title fight. His obsession soon leaves him at the mercy of a notorious trainer who takes every last ounce from his mind, body and soul.

programme.title: Good Kill (2014)
programme.desc: An Air Force drone pilot (Ethan Hawke) begins to question the ethics of dropping bombs on Afghanistan from the safety of his post in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Ida Red (2021)
programme.desc: Crime boss Ida "Red" Walker turns to her son, Wyatt, to pull off one last heist to get out of prison. However, with the FBI closing in, Wyatt must soon choose between family and freedom.

programme.title: Shooter (2007)
programme.desc: Reluctantly pressed into service again, a former military sniper plots revenge against his powerful foes after being betrayed and wounded.

programme.title: Shaft (2000)
programme.desc: A detective (Samuel L. Jackson) and a narcotics cop (Vanessa L. Williams) track a sociopath out to kill a woman who can testify that he committed murder.

programme.title: Chuck (2016)
programme.desc: Liquor salesman and part-time prizefighter Chuck Wepner gets the chance to take on Muhammad Ali in a highly publicized title fight, launching him to sudden fame.

programme.title: Warrior (2011)
programme.desc: An Iraq War veteran (Tom Hardy) finds himself on a collision course with his estranged brother (Joel Edgerton) when both set their sights on winning a tournament in mixed martial arts.

programme.title: The Comeback Trail (2020)
programme.desc: Indebted to a mobster, a desperate producer tries to "accidentally" kill an aging movie star for an insurance scam. However, he soon begins to realize that the film theyre shooting is a masterpiece in the making.

programme.title: Harlem Nights (1989)
programme.desc: Business partners resisting a white mobster trying to take over their nightclub in the 1930s Harlem.

programme.title: All Up in the Biz (2023)
programme.desc: Celebrity interviews and rare archival footage provide insight into the life and legacy of hip-hop icon Biz Markie.

programme.title: McEnroe (2022)
programme.desc: John McEnroe finally tells his side of his storied career and performances on the court.

programme.title: McEnroe (2022)
programme.desc: John McEnroe finally tells his side of his storied career and performances on the court.

programme.title: Love and Monsters (2020)
programme.desc: A young man and his traveling companions battle an array of monsters during an 80-mile journey to find the woman he loves.

programme.title: Mourning in Lod (2023)
programme.desc: The fates of three families become inextricably intertwined when a Palestinian citizen is killed by a Jewish settler in the city of Lod, Israel, and deadly riots break out.

programme.title: Cursed (2005)
programme.desc: Siblings (Christina Ricci, Jesse Eisenberg) hunt for the werewolf that attacked them and transformed them into lycanthropes.

programme.title: The Return (2024)
programme.desc: After 20 years away, Odysseus washes up on the shores of Ithaca. The king finds much has changed since he left to fight in the Trojan War. No longer the mighty warrior his people remember, Odysseus must face his past to save his family.

programme.title: Freedoms Path (2022)
programme.desc: When Union soldier William runs from battle, hes taken to safety by a heroic young Black man. Kitch is part of a secret community of freed slaves running a section of the Underground Railroad, but a desperate slave catcher is on their trail.

programme.title: Runaway Bride (1999)
programme.desc: A New York reporter (Richard Gere) travels to Maryland to profile a woman (Julia Roberts) who left three bridegrooms at the altar.

programme.title: Mothers Day (2016)
programme.desc: As Mothers Day draws near, a single mom (Jennifer Aniston) learns that her ex-husband (Timothy Olyphant) is marrying a younger woman (Shay Mitchell), while a recently widowed man (Jason Sudeikis) struggles to raise his two daughters.

programme.title: The Reader (2008)
programme.desc: In postwar Germany, a teenager (David Kross) has a love affair with an older woman (Kate Winslet) who is hiding a terrible secret.

programme.title: Nocturnal Animals (2016)
programme.desc: A writer (Jake Gyllenhaal) asks his ex-wife (Amy Adams) to read a manuscript of his new novel, a troubling story about a family man whose life takes a dark turn.

programme.title: The Curious Case of Benjamin Button (2008)
programme.sub-title: The Curious Case of Benjamin Button (2008)
programme.desc: Benjamin Button (Brad Pitt) is born an old man in 1918 New Orleans and ages in reverse and, in so doing, becomes intimately familiar with the natures of love and death.

programme.title: Muriels Wedding (1994)
programme.desc: An Australian social outcast (Toni Collette) moves to Sydney, cares for an ailing friend (Rachel Griffiths) and weds an Olympian needing citizen status.

programme.title: Bridget Joness Baby (2016)
programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones (Renee Zellweger) must figure out which of the two men (Colin Firth, Patrick Dempsey) in her life is the father of her child.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason (2004)
programme.sub-title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason (2004)
programme.desc: An attractive lawyer and Bridgets (Renee Zellweger) former boss (Hugh Grant) threaten her newfound happiness with Mark Darcy (Colin Firth).

programme.title: The Good Liar (2019)
programme.desc: Career con artist Roy Courtnay walks a treacherous tightrope as he hatches a scheme to swindle a well-to-do widow.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider (2001)
programme.desc: A beautiful globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) battles otherworldly creatures for possession of a powerful artifact.

programme.title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.sub-title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.desc: A globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) must find Pandoras box before a maniacal scientist (Ciarán Hinds) can harness its power for world domination.

programme.title: The Stepford Wives (2004)
programme.desc: A man and his wife move to a quaint suburb where most of the women seem to have the same bland personality.

programme.title: Spencer (2021)
programme.desc: The marriage between Princess Diana and Prince Charles has grown cold. Though rumors of affairs and a divorce abound, peace is ordained for the Christmas festivities at the queens estate. However, this year, things will be profoundly different.

programme.title: The Queen (2006)
programme.desc: Queen Elizabeth II and Prime Minister Tony Blair try to reach a compromise in determining the royal familys public reaction to Princess Dianas death.

programme.title: The Talented Mr. Ripley (1999)
programme.desc: A young man (Matt Damon) travels to 1950s Italy and begins to assume the identity of a playboy (Jude Law) he was hired to bring back to the United States.

programme.title: Babel (2006)
programme.desc: A tragic accidents scope expands, catching four groups of people on three continents in its terrible grip.

programme.title: Bridget Joness Baby (2016)
programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones (Renee Zellweger) must figure out which of the two men (Colin Firth, Patrick Dempsey) in her life is the father of her child.

programme.title: Love, Rosie (2014)
programme.desc: Rosie and Alex are best friends until Alexs family moves to America. They gamble everything to keep their love and friendship alive over the years and miles.

programme.title: Miles to Go Before I Sleep
programme.desc: The relationships between musicians and their road crews and the importance of the people who work to put shows together.

programme.title: The Best of Me (2014)
programme.desc: The funeral of a close friend reunites former high-school sweethearts, who find that they are still in love after 20 years apart.

programme.title: What If (2013)
programme.desc: A medical-school dropout tries to hide his attraction to his new friend, a bubbly artist who already has a boyfriend.

programme.title: A Walk on the Moon (1999)
programme.desc: A dissatisfied housewife (Diane Lane) sows wild oats with a traveling salesman (Viggo Mortensen) at a Catskills resort in the summer of 1969.

programme.title: The Girl on the Train (2016)
programme.desc: Rachel, who is devastated by her divorce, spends her commute fantasizing about the couple that lives in a house that her train passes. One morning, she sees something shocking and becomes entangled in a missing persons investigation.

programme.title: The Romantics (2010)
programme.desc: Longtime rivalries resurface in the hours before a woman is scheduled to marry the former lover of her college roommate.

programme.title: Forces of Nature (1999)
programme.desc: A bridegroom (Ben Affleck) hurries by plane to his wedding, but he and his seatmate (Sandra Bullock) must find other modes of travel.

programme.title: The To Do List (2013)
programme.desc: Determined to shed her uptight image, a high-school valedictorian (Aubrey Plaza) decides to lose her virginity before college begins. Realizing that she is out of her depth, she asks friends and family for advice.

programme.title: The Stand-In (2020)
programme.desc: A stand-in takes over an actresss career and identity after performing her community service for tax evasion.

programme.title: Queen Bees (2021)
programme.desc: While her house undergoes repairs, fiercely independent senior Helen temporarily moves into a nearby retirement community, where she encounters lusty widows, cutthroat bridge tournaments and a hotbed of bullying "mean girls."

programme.title: Pixie (2020)
programme.desc: Pixie sets out to avenge her mothers death and attempts a heist that will give her the means to leave her small-town life behind. When the plan goes horribly wrong, shes forced to team up with a pair of misfits who are clearly in over their heads.

programme.title: Double Jeopardy (1999)
programme.desc: In an insurance scam, a man fakes his death and sets his wife up to take the blame. After serving 10 years in prison, she sets out to get revenge, immune from the law since she cannot be re-prosecuted for the same crime.

programme.title: Miles to Go Before I Sleep
programme.desc: The relationships between musicians and their road crews and the importance of the people who work to put shows together.

programme.title: The Best of Me (2014)
programme.desc: The funeral of a close friend reunites former high-school sweethearts, who find that they are still in love after 20 years apart.

programme.title: Pretty in Pink (1986)
programme.desc: A rich teen asks an unpopular student to the senior prom, creating problems among their separate circles of friends.

programme.title: What Women Want (2000)
programme.desc: A freak accident gives a Chicago advertising executive (Mel Gibson) the ability to read womens minds.

programme.title: Shes Out of My League (2010)
programme.desc: An airport security agent must figure out how to make the relationship work when a beautiful, successful woman falls in love with him.

programme.title: Indecent Proposal (1993)
programme.desc: A Las Vegas mystery man (Robert Redford) offers a desperate couple (Demi Moore, Woody Harrelson) $1 million for a night with the wife.

programme.title: The Intervention (2016)
programme.desc: A weekend getaway for four couples takes a sharp turn when one of the couples discovers the entire trip was orchestrated to host an intervention on their marriage.

programme.title: Marvins Room (1996)
programme.desc: A Florida leukemia patient (Diane Keaton) needs her sisters (Meryl Streep) bone marrow, but first they must end a 20-year feud.

programme.title: Doubt (2008)
programme.desc: Suspicions of child abuse fuel a traditionalist nuns (Meryl Streep) personal crusade against a popular priest (Philip Seymour Hoffman) who wants to reform her schools strict customs.

programme.title: Wild Fly
programme.desc: South Africas famous game reserve The Kruger Park is the stage for a scientific expedition to tag and track the indigenous tiger fish.
